---
title: "Subsampling"
author: "Sachin Subedi"
date: "2026-04-16"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
```

#Set Working Directory
```{r}
setwd("~/data/")
```

### Loading data for subsampling
```{r}
data <- read.delim("final_seq_data_updated.tsv", sep="\t", stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
colnames(data)
```

```{r}
library(lubridate)
data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    Year = year(Collection_Date_Final)
  )
selected_locations <- unique(data$Country)
selected_years     <- unique(data$Year)
selected_habitats  <- unique(data$Habitat)
```

### Stratified subsampling

```{r}
library(dplyr)

subsample_and_save <- function(data, seed, label, max_samples = 2) {
  set.seed(seed)

  if (!dir.exists("stratified")) dir.create("stratified")

  subsampled_data <- data %>%
    group_by(Country, Year, Habitat) %>%
    group_modify(function(.x, .y) {
      if (nrow(.x) <= max_samples) {
        return(.x)
      } else {
        return(slice_sample(.x, n = max_samples))
      }
    }) %>%
    ungroup()

  subsampled_counts <- subsampled_data %>%
    group_by(Country, Year, Habitat) %>%
    summarise(isolate_count = n_distinct(Isolate_Id), .groups = "drop")

  cat("\n==========", label, "==========\n")
  print(subsampled_counts)
  print(table(subsampled_data$Country))
  print(table(subsampled_data$Year))
  print(table(subsampled_data$Habitat))

  sub_dir <- file.path("stratified", label)
  if (!dir.exists(sub_dir)) dir.create(sub_dir)

  out_file <- file.path(sub_dir, paste0(label, ".tsv"))
  write.table(subsampled_data, out_file, sep = "\t", row.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)

  return(list(data = subsampled_data, counts = subsampled_counts))
}

subsampled1 <- subsample_and_save(data, seed = 2324, label = "rep1_stratified")
```


### Plotting of stratified subsample

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(lubridate)
library(scales)
library(patchwork)
library(readxl)

required_seq  <- "final_seq_data_updated.tsv"
required_case <- "Latest Reported Events.xlsx"

if (!file.exists(required_seq))  stop("Missing final_seq_data_updated.tsv in parent dir")
if (!file.exists(required_case)) stop("Missing Latest Reported Events.xlsx in parent dir")

base_dir <- getwd()

d       <- "rep1_stratified"
run_dir <- file.path(base_dir, "stratified", d)
run_tsv <- file.path(run_dir, paste0(d, ".tsv"))
if (!file.exists(run_tsv)) stop("Missing subsample file: ", run_tsv)

message("Running plots in: ", d)

full_raw      <- read.delim(file.path(base_dir, required_seq), sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
subsample_raw <- read.delim(run_tsv, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
case_raw      <- read_excel(file.path(base_dir, required_case))

full_raw <- full_raw %>%
  mutate(Collection_Date_Final = as.Date(Collection_Date_Final),
         Year = lubridate::year(Collection_Date_Final))

subsample_raw <- subsample_raw %>%
  mutate(Collection_Date_Final = as.Date(Collection_Date_Final),
         Year = lubridate::year(Collection_Date_Final))

case_europe <- case_raw %>%
  mutate(Year = lubridate::year(as.Date(`observation date`))) %>%
  group_by(Year) %>%
  summarise(total_cases = dplyr::n_distinct(`Event ID`), .groups = "drop")

hab_pal <- c(
  Coastal="#0072B2", Farm="#CD5C5C", Forest="#BCBD22", Grassland="#26A69A",
  `Human_Modified`="#56B4E9", Marine="#CC79A7", Shrubland="lightslategray",
  Urban="#E6842A", Others="#000000", Woodland="#6B4C1B", Rock="#7570B3", Wetland="#006D2C"
)

clean_hab <- function(df) df %>%
  mutate(Habitat = trimws(Habitat),
         Habitat = ifelse(Habitat %in% names(hab_pal), Habitat, "Others"))

full_hab <- clean_hab(full_raw)
sub_hab  <- clean_hab(subsample_raw)

hab_counts_full <- full_hab %>%
  group_by(Year, Habitat) %>%
  summarise(n_isolates = n_distinct(Isolate_Id), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(case_europe, by = "Year")

hab_counts_sub <- sub_hab %>%
  group_by(Year, Habitat) %>%
  summarise(n_isolates = n_distinct(Isolate_Id), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(case_europe, by = "Year")

scale_hab_full <- max(hab_counts_full$n_isolates, na.rm = TRUE) / max(hab_counts_full$total_cases, na.rm = TRUE)
scale_hab_sub  <- max(hab_counts_sub$n_isolates,  na.rm = TRUE) / max(hab_counts_sub$total_cases,  na.rm = TRUE)

plot_hab <- function(df, sf, ttl){
  ggplot(df, aes(x = Year)) +
    geom_bar(aes(y = n_isolates, fill = Habitat),
             stat = "identity", position = "dodge", width = 1.4) +
    geom_line(aes(y = total_cases * sf), colour = "black", size = 1) +
    geom_point(aes(y = total_cases * sf), colour = "black", size = 2) +
    geom_text(
      data = df %>% filter(Year == 2017) %>% slice(1),
      aes(x = Year, y = total_cases * sf, label = "Case Counts"),
      colour = "black", size = 7, hjust = -0.2, vjust = -0.8, inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = hab_pal, drop = FALSE) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2016:2025) +
    scale_y_continuous("Number of Isolates",
                       sec.axis = sec_axis(~./sf, name = "Number of Cases")) +
    labs(title = ttl, x = "Year") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.direction = "horizontal")
}

p_hab_full <- plot_hab(hab_counts_full, scale_hab_full, "Isolates & Cases by Habitat (Full Data)")
p_hab_sub  <- plot_hab(hab_counts_sub,  scale_hab_sub,  "Isolates & Cases by Habitat (Subsample)")

combined_hab <- (p_hab_full / p_hab_sub) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

type_pal <- c(
  Domestic_Mammal="#6A3D9A", Domestic_Bird="#CD5C5C",
  Wild_Mammal="#BCBD22", Human="#1B9E77", Wild_Bird="#3C5488", Others="#000000"
)

clean_type <- function(df) df %>%
  mutate(Type = trimws(Type),
         Type = ifelse(Type %in% names(type_pal), Type, "Others"))

full_type <- clean_type(full_raw)
sub_type  <- clean_type(subsample_raw)

type_counts_full <- full_type %>%
  group_by(Year, Type) %>%
  summarise(n_isolates = n_distinct(Isolate_Id), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(case_europe, by = "Year")

type_counts_sub <- sub_type %>%
  group_by(Year, Type) %>%
  summarise(n_isolates = n_distinct(Isolate_Id), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(case_europe, by = "Year")

scale_type_full <- max(type_counts_full$n_isolates, na.rm = TRUE) / max(type_counts_full$total_cases, na.rm = TRUE)
scale_type_sub  <- max(type_counts_sub$n_isolates,  na.rm = TRUE) / max(type_counts_sub$total_cases,  na.rm = TRUE)

plot_type <- function(df, sf, ttl){
  ggplot(df, aes(x = Year)) +
    geom_bar(aes(y = n_isolates, fill = Type),
             stat = "identity", position = "dodge", width = 1.4) +
    geom_line(aes(y = total_cases * sf), colour = "black", size = 1) +
    geom_point(aes(y = total_cases * sf), colour = "black", size = 2) +
    geom_text(
      data = df %>% filter(Year == 2017) %>% slice(1),
      aes(x = Year, y = total_cases * sf, label = "Case Counts"),
      colour = "black", size = 7, hjust = -0.2, vjust = -0.8, inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = type_pal, name = "Host", drop = FALSE) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2016:2025) +
    scale_y_continuous("Number of Isolates",
                       sec.axis = sec_axis(~./sf, name = "Number of Cases")) +
    labs(title = ttl, x = "Year") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.direction = "horizontal")
}

p_type_full <- plot_type(type_counts_full, scale_type_full, "Isolates & Cases by Host Type (Full Data)")
p_type_sub  <- plot_type(type_counts_sub,  scale_type_sub,  "Isolates & Cases by Host Type (Subsample)")

combined_type <- (p_type_full / p_type_sub) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

hc_cols <- c(
  HC_Cluster_1_Alpine = "#0072B2",
  HC_Cluster_1_Arctic = "#8DA0CB",
  HC_Cluster_1_Atlantic = "#CD5C5C",
  HC_Cluster_1_Continental = "#BCBD22",
  HC_Cluster_2_Alpine = "#26A69A",
  HC_Cluster_2_Continental = "#CC79A7",
  HC_Cluster_2_Mediterranean = "lightslategray",
  HC_Cluster_2_Pannonian = "#6B4C1B",
  HC_Cluster_3_Alpine = "#7570B3",
  HC_Cluster_3_Boreal = "#006D2C",
  HC_Cluster_4_Mediterranean = "#56B4E9"
)

hc_bio_levels <- sort(unique(na.omit(trimws(as.character(full_raw$HC_Bio_Combined)))))
hc_bio_levels <- hc_bio_levels[hc_bio_levels != ""]
if (length(hc_bio_levels) == 0) stop("No non-missing values found in HC_Bio_Combined")

clean_hc_bio <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(HC_Bio_Combined = trimws(as.character(HC_Bio_Combined))) %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(HC_Bio_Combined),
      nzchar(HC_Bio_Combined),
      HC_Bio_Combined %in% names(hc_cols)
    )
}

full_hc_bio <- clean_hc_bio(full_raw)
sub_hc_bio  <- clean_hc_bio(subsample_raw)
if (nrow(full_hc_bio) == 0) {
  stop("No rows left after matching HC_Bio_Combined to hc_cols (check labels match pipeline 7C, underscore form).")
}

hc_bio_counts_full <- full_hc_bio %>%
  group_by(Year, HC_Bio_Combined) %>%
  summarise(n_isolates = n_distinct(Isolate_Id), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(case_europe, by = "Year")

hc_bio_counts_sub <- sub_hc_bio %>%
  group_by(Year, HC_Bio_Combined) %>%
  summarise(n_isolates = n_distinct(Isolate_Id), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(case_europe, by = "Year")

scale_hc_bio_full <- max(hc_bio_counts_full$n_isolates, na.rm = TRUE) / max(hc_bio_counts_full$total_cases, na.rm = TRUE)
scale_hc_bio_sub  <- max(hc_bio_counts_sub$n_isolates,  na.rm = TRUE) / max(hc_bio_counts_sub$total_cases,  na.rm = TRUE)

plot_hc_bio <- function(df, sf, ttl){
  ggplot(df, aes(x = Year)) +
    geom_bar(aes(y = n_isolates, fill = HC_Bio_Combined),
             stat = "identity", position = "dodge", width = 1.4) +
    geom_line(aes(y = total_cases * sf), colour = "black", size = 1) +
    geom_point(aes(y = total_cases * sf), colour = "black", size = 2) +
    geom_text(
      data = df %>% filter(Year == 2017) %>% slice(1),
      aes(x = Year, y = total_cases * sf, label = "Case Counts"),
      colour = "black", size = 7, hjust = -0.2, vjust = -0.8, inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = hc_cols,
      name   = "HC_Bio_Combined",
      drop   = FALSE,
      breaks = names(hc_cols)
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2016:2025) +
    scale_y_continuous("Number of Isolates",
                       sec.axis = sec_axis(~./sf, name = "Number of Cases")) +
    labs(title = ttl, x = "Year") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.direction = "horizontal") +
    guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 3))
}

p_hc_bio_full <- plot_hc_bio(hc_bio_counts_full, scale_hc_bio_full, "Isolates & Cases by HC_Bio_Combined (Full Data)")
p_hc_bio_sub  <- plot_hc_bio(hc_bio_counts_sub,  scale_hc_bio_sub,  "Isolates & Cases by HC_Bio_Combined (Subsample)")

combined_hc_bio <- (p_hc_bio_full / p_hc_bio_sub) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave(file.path(run_dir, paste0("Habitat_", d, ".png")),
       combined_hab,  width = 14, height = 9, dpi = 300, bg = "transparent")
ggsave(file.path(run_dir, paste0("Habitat_", d, ".pdf")),
       combined_hab,  width = 14, height = 9)

ggsave(file.path(run_dir, paste0("Host_", d, ".png")),
       combined_type, width = 14, height = 9, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(run_dir, paste0("Host_", d, ".pdf")),
       combined_type, width = 14, height = 9)

ggsave(file.path(run_dir, paste0("HC_Bio_Combined_", d, ".png")),
       combined_hc_bio, width = 14, height = 9, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(run_dir, paste0("HC_Bio_Combined_", d, ".pdf")),
       combined_hc_bio, width = 14, height = 9)
```


### Equal subsampling

```{r hc-bio-class-subsample}
library(dplyr)

if (!"HC_Bio_Combined" %in% names(data)) {
  stop("Column HC_Bio_Combined not found in data — add it in the pipeline or TSV.")
}

n_per_class <- 130L

sample_by_hc_bio_class <- function(df, n_take, seed) {
  set.seed(seed)
  df %>%
    mutate(HC_Bio_Combined = trimws(as.character(HC_Bio_Combined))) %>%
    filter(!is.na(HC_Bio_Combined), nzchar(HC_Bio_Combined)) %>%
    group_by(HC_Bio_Combined) %>%
    group_modify(function(.x, .y) {
      if (nrow(.x) == 0L) {
        return(.x)
      }
      k <- min(n_take, nrow(.x))
      dplyr::slice_sample(.x, n = k, replace = FALSE)
    }) %>%
    ungroup()
}

if (!dir.exists("equal")) dir.create("equal")

rep_label <- "rep1_equal"
out_dir   <- file.path("equal", rep_label)
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

sub_i <- sample_by_hc_bio_class(data, n_take = n_per_class, seed = 2324L)

counts_i <- sub_i %>%
  count(HC_Bio_Combined, name = "n_sampled")

cat("\n========== HC_Bio_Combined equal sample:", rep_label, "==========\n")
print(counts_i, n = 100)
cat("Total sequences:", nrow(sub_i), "\n")

out_tsv <- file.path(out_dir, paste0(rep_label, ".tsv"))
write.table(sub_i, out_tsv, sep = "\t", row.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)
message("Wrote ", out_tsv)
```

### Plotting equal subsample

```{r class-subsample-plots}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(lubridate)
library(scales)
library(patchwork)
library(readxl)

required_seq  <- "final_seq_data_updated.tsv"
required_case <- "Latest Reported Events.xlsx"

if (!file.exists(required_seq))  stop("Missing final_seq_data_updated.tsv in parent dir")
if (!file.exists(required_case)) stop("Missing Latest Reported Events.xlsx in parent dir")

base_dir <- getwd()

d       <- "rep1_equal"
run_dir <- file.path(base_dir, "equal", d)
run_tsv <- file.path(run_dir, paste0(d, ".tsv"))
if (!file.exists(run_tsv)) {
  stop("Missing equal subsample file: ", run_tsv, " — run the hc-bio-class-subsample chunk first.")
}

message("Running equal subsample plots in: ", d)

full_raw      <- read.delim(file.path(base_dir, required_seq), sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
subsample_raw <- read.delim(run_tsv, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
case_raw      <- read_excel(file.path(base_dir, required_case))

full_raw <- full_raw %>%
  mutate(Collection_Date_Final = as.Date(Collection_Date_Final),
         Year = lubridate::year(Collection_Date_Final))

subsample_raw <- subsample_raw %>%
  mutate(Collection_Date_Final = as.Date(Collection_Date_Final),
         Year = lubridate::year(Collection_Date_Final))

case_europe <- case_raw %>%
  mutate(Year = lubridate::year(as.Date(`observation date`))) %>%
  group_by(Year) %>%
  summarise(total_cases = dplyr::n_distinct(`Event ID`), .groups = "drop")

hab_pal <- c(
  Coastal = "#0072B2", Farm = "#CD5C5C", Forest = "#BCBD22", Grassland = "#26A69A",
  `Human_Modified` = "#56B4E9", Marine = "#CC79A7", Shrubland = "lightslategray",
  Urban = "#E6842A", Others = "#000000", Woodland = "#6B4C1B", Rock = "#7570B3", Wetland = "#006D2C"
)

clean_hab <- function(df) df %>%
  mutate(Habitat = trimws(Habitat),
         Habitat = ifelse(Habitat %in% names(hab_pal), Habitat, "Others"))

full_hab <- clean_hab(full_raw)
sub_hab  <- clean_hab(subsample_raw)

hab_counts_full <- full_hab %>%
  group_by(Year, Habitat) %>%
  summarise(n_isolates = n_distinct(Isolate_Id), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(case_europe, by = "Year")

hab_counts_sub <- sub_hab %>%
  group_by(Year, Habitat) %>%
  summarise(n_isolates = n_distinct(Isolate_Id), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(case_europe, by = "Year")

scale_hab_full <- max(hab_counts_full$n_isolates, na.rm = TRUE) / max(hab_counts_full$total_cases, na.rm = TRUE)
scale_hab_sub  <- max(hab_counts_sub$n_isolates,  na.rm = TRUE) / max(hab_counts_sub$total_cases,  na.rm = TRUE)

plot_hab <- function(df, sf, ttl) {
  ggplot(df, aes(x = Year)) +
    geom_bar(aes(y = n_isolates, fill = Habitat),
             stat = "identity", position = "dodge", width = 1.4) +
    geom_line(aes(y = total_cases * sf), colour = "black", size = 1) +
    geom_point(aes(y = total_cases * sf), colour = "black", size = 2) +
    geom_text(
      data = df %>% filter(Year == 2017) %>% slice(1),
      aes(x = Year, y = total_cases * sf, label = "Case Counts"),
      colour = "black", size = 7, hjust = -0.2, vjust = -0.8, inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = hab_pal, drop = FALSE) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2016:2025) +
    scale_y_continuous("Number of Isolates",
                       sec.axis = sec_axis(~./sf, name = "Number of Cases")) +
    labs(title = ttl, x = "Year") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.direction = "horizontal")
}

p_hab_full <- plot_hab(hab_counts_full, scale_hab_full, "Isolates & Cases by Habitat (Full Data)")
p_hab_sub  <- plot_hab(hab_counts_sub,  scale_hab_sub,
                       "Isolates & Cases by Habitat (Equal subsample)")

combined_hab <- (p_hab_full / p_hab_sub) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

type_pal <- c(
  Domestic_Mammal = "#6A3D9A", Domestic_Bird = "#CD5C5C",
  Wild_Mammal = "#BCBD22", Human = "#1B9E77", Wild_Bird = "#3C5488", Others = "#000000"
)

clean_type <- function(df) df %>%
  mutate(Type = trimws(Type),
         Type = ifelse(Type %in% names(type_pal), Type, "Others"))

full_type <- clean_type(full_raw)
sub_type  <- clean_type(subsample_raw)

type_counts_full <- full_type %>%
  group_by(Year, Type) %>%
  summarise(n_isolates = n_distinct(Isolate_Id), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(case_europe, by = "Year")

type_counts_sub <- sub_type %>%
  group_by(Year, Type) %>%
  summarise(n_isolates = n_distinct(Isolate_Id), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(case_europe, by = "Year")

scale_type_full <- max(type_counts_full$n_isolates, na.rm = TRUE) / max(type_counts_full$total_cases, na.rm = TRUE)
scale_type_sub  <- max(type_counts_sub$n_isolates,  na.rm = TRUE) / max(type_counts_sub$total_cases,  na.rm = TRUE)

plot_type <- function(df, sf, ttl) {
  ggplot(df, aes(x = Year)) +
    geom_bar(aes(y = n_isolates, fill = Type),
             stat = "identity", position = "dodge", width = 1.4) +
    geom_line(aes(y = total_cases * sf), colour = "black", size = 1) +
    geom_point(aes(y = total_cases * sf), colour = "black", size = 2) +
    geom_text(
      data = df %>% filter(Year == 2017) %>% slice(1),
      aes(x = Year, y = total_cases * sf, label = "Case Counts"),
      colour = "black", size = 7, hjust = -0.2, vjust = -0.8, inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = type_pal, name = "Host", drop = FALSE) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2016:2025) +
    scale_y_continuous("Number of Isolates",
                       sec.axis = sec_axis(~./sf, name = "Number of Cases")) +
    labs(title = ttl, x = "Year") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.direction = "horizontal")
}

p_type_full <- plot_type(type_counts_full, scale_type_full, "Isolates & Cases by Host Type (Full Data)")
p_type_sub  <- plot_type(type_counts_sub,  scale_type_sub,
                         "Isolates & Cases by Host Type (Equal subsample)")

combined_type <- (p_type_full / p_type_sub) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

hc_cols <- c(
  HC_Cluster_1_Alpine = "#0072B2",
  HC_Cluster_1_Arctic = "#8DA0CB",
  HC_Cluster_1_Atlantic = "#CD5C5C",
  HC_Cluster_1_Continental = "#BCBD22",
  HC_Cluster_2_Alpine = "#26A69A",
  HC_Cluster_2_Continental = "#CC79A7",
  HC_Cluster_2_Mediterranean = "lightslategray",
  HC_Cluster_2_Pannonian = "#6B4C1B",
  HC_Cluster_3_Alpine = "#7570B3",
  HC_Cluster_3_Boreal = "#006D2C",
  HC_Cluster_4_Mediterranean = "#56B4E9"
)

clean_hc_bio <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(HC_Bio_Combined = trimws(as.character(HC_Bio_Combined))) %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(HC_Bio_Combined),
      nzchar(HC_Bio_Combined),
      HC_Bio_Combined %in% names(hc_cols)
    )
}

full_hc_bio <- clean_hc_bio(full_raw)
sub_hc_bio  <- clean_hc_bio(subsample_raw)
if (nrow(full_hc_bio) == 0) {
  stop("No rows left after matching HC_Bio_Combined to hc_cols (check labels match pipeline 7C, underscore form).")
}

hc_bio_counts_full <- full_hc_bio %>%
  group_by(Year, HC_Bio_Combined) %>%
  summarise(n_isolates = n_distinct(Isolate_Id), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(case_europe, by = "Year")

hc_bio_counts_sub <- sub_hc_bio %>%
  group_by(Year, HC_Bio_Combined) %>%
  summarise(n_isolates = n_distinct(Isolate_Id), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(case_europe, by = "Year")

scale_hc_bio_full <- max(hc_bio_counts_full$n_isolates, na.rm = TRUE) / max(hc_bio_counts_full$total_cases, na.rm = TRUE)
scale_hc_bio_sub  <- max(hc_bio_counts_sub$n_isolates,  na.rm = TRUE) / max(hc_bio_counts_sub$total_cases,  na.rm = TRUE)

plot_hc_bio <- function(df, sf, ttl) {
  ggplot(df, aes(x = Year)) +
    geom_bar(aes(y = n_isolates, fill = HC_Bio_Combined),
             stat = "identity", position = "dodge", width = 1.4) +
    geom_line(aes(y = total_cases * sf), colour = "black", size = 1) +
    geom_point(aes(y = total_cases * sf), colour = "black", size = 2) +
    geom_text(
      data = df %>% filter(Year == 2017) %>% slice(1),
      aes(x = Year, y = total_cases * sf, label = "Case Counts"),
      colour = "black", size = 7, hjust = -0.2, vjust = -0.8, inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = hc_cols,
      name   = "HC_Bio_Combined",
      drop   = FALSE,
      breaks = names(hc_cols)
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2016:2025) +
    scale_y_continuous("Number of Isolates",
                       sec.axis = sec_axis(~./sf, name = "Number of Cases")) +
    labs(title = ttl, x = "Year") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.direction = "horizontal") +
    guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 3))
}

p_hc_bio_full <- plot_hc_bio(hc_bio_counts_full, scale_hc_bio_full,
                             "Isolates & Cases by HC_Bio_Combined (Full Data)")
p_hc_bio_sub  <- plot_hc_bio(hc_bio_counts_sub,  scale_hc_bio_sub,
                             "Isolates & Cases by HC_Bio_Combined (Equal subsample)")

combined_hc_bio <- (p_hc_bio_full / p_hc_bio_sub) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave(file.path(run_dir, paste0("Habitat_", d, ".png")),
       combined_hab,  width = 14, height = 9, dpi = 300, bg = "transparent")
ggsave(file.path(run_dir, paste0("Habitat_", d, ".pdf")),
       combined_hab,  width = 14, height = 9)

ggsave(file.path(run_dir, paste0("Host_", d, ".png")),
       combined_type, width = 14, height = 9, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(run_dir, paste0("Host_", d, ".pdf")),
       combined_type, width = 14, height = 9)

ggsave(file.path(run_dir, paste0("HC_Bio_Combined_", d, ".png")),
       combined_hc_bio, width = 14, height = 9, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(run_dir, paste0("HC_Bio_Combined_", d, ".pdf")),
       combined_hc_bio, width = 14, height = 9)

message("Equal subsample plots finished.")
```

### Proportional subsampling

```{r hc-bio-proportional-subsample}
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)

if (!"HC_Bio_Combined" %in% names(data)) {
  stop("Column HC_Bio_Combined not found in data — add it in the pipeline or TSV.")
}

hc_bio_ten_classes <- c(
  "HC_Cluster_1_Alpine",
  "HC_Cluster_1_Atlantic",
  "HC_Cluster_1_Continental",
  "HC_Cluster_2_Alpine",
  "HC_Cluster_2_Continental",
  "HC_Cluster_2_Mediterranean",
  "HC_Cluster_2_Pannonian",
  "HC_Cluster_3_Alpine",
  "HC_Cluster_3_Boreal",
  "HC_Cluster_4_Mediterranean"
)

target_n_proportional    <- 1200L
min_sequences_per_stratum <- 20L

required_case_prop <- "Latest Reported Events.xlsx"
if (!file.exists(required_case_prop)) {
  stop("Missing ", required_case_prop)
}

case_raw_prop <- read_excel(required_case_prop)
if (!all(c("Event ID", "observation date") %in% names(case_raw_prop))) {
  stop(required_case_prop, " must contain columns 'Event ID' and 'observation date'.")
}

dominant_hc_by_country <- data %>%
  mutate(HC_Bio_Combined = trimws(as.character(HC_Bio_Combined))) %>%
  filter(!is.na(HC_Bio_Combined), nzchar(HC_Bio_Combined)) %>%
  count(Country, HC_Bio_Combined, name = "n_iso") %>%
  group_by(Country) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = n_iso, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(Country, HC_Bio_Combined)

idx_hc <- which(tolower(names(case_raw_prop)) == "hc_bio_combined")
hc_col_direct <- if (length(idx_hc)) names(case_raw_prop)[idx_hc[1]] else NA_character_
if (is.na(hc_col_direct)) {
  idx_hc2 <- which(grepl("HC_Bio", names(case_raw_prop), ignore.case = TRUE) &
    grepl("Combined", names(case_raw_prop), ignore.case = TRUE))
  hc_col_direct <- if (length(idx_hc2)) names(case_raw_prop)[idx_hc2[1]] else NA_character_
}

if (!is.na(hc_col_direct) && nzchar(hc_col_direct)) {
  tagged_events <- case_raw_prop %>%
    mutate(
      Event_ID = .data[["Event ID"]],
      HC_Bio_Combined = trimws(as.character(.data[[hc_col_direct]]))
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(HC_Bio_Combined), nzchar(HC_Bio_Combined))
  cat("Mapping events to HC_Bio_Combined using Excel column:", hc_col_direct, "\n")
} else {
  country_col <- intersect(names(case_raw_prop), c("Country", "country", "Reporting country"))[1]
  if (is.na(country_col) || !nzchar(country_col)) {
    country_col <- names(case_raw_prop)[grepl("^country$", names(case_raw_prop), ignore.case = TRUE)][1]
  }
  if (is.na(country_col) || !nzchar(country_col)) {
    stop(
      "No HC_Bio_Combined column found in ", required_case_prop,
      " and no Country column — add HC_Bio_Combined or Country to map events to regions."
    )
  }
  tagged_events <- case_raw_prop %>%
    mutate(
      Event_ID = .data[["Event ID"]],
      Country = trimws(as.character(.data[[country_col]]))
    ) %>%
    left_join(dominant_hc_by_country, by = "Country") %>%
    filter(!is.na(HC_Bio_Combined))
  cat("Mapping events to HC_Bio_Combined via Country column:", country_col, "\n")
}

case_by_hc <- tagged_events %>%
  distinct(Event_ID, HC_Bio_Combined) %>%
  count(HC_Bio_Combined, name = "n_cases")

seq_avail <- data %>%
  mutate(HC_Bio_Combined = trimws(as.character(HC_Bio_Combined))) %>%
  filter(!is.na(HC_Bio_Combined), nzchar(HC_Bio_Combined)) %>%
  group_by(HC_Bio_Combined) %>%
  summarise(n_seq = dplyr::n_distinct(Isolate_Id), .groups = "drop")

alloc_base <- tibble(HC_Bio_Combined = hc_bio_ten_classes) %>%
  left_join(case_by_hc, by = "HC_Bio_Combined") %>%
  mutate(n_cases = dplyr::coalesce(n_cases, 0L)) %>%
  left_join(seq_avail, by = "HC_Bio_Combined") %>%
  mutate(n_seq = dplyr::coalesce(n_seq, 0L))

missing_seq <- alloc_base %>% filter(n_seq < 1L)
if (nrow(missing_seq) > 0L) {
  stop(
    "All 10 HC_Bio_Combined strata need >=1 sequence in main data. Missing:\n",
    paste(missing_seq$HC_Bio_Combined, collapse = ", ")
  )
}

if (sum(alloc_base$n_cases) < 1L) {
  stop("No epidemic cases mapped to the 10 strata — check Excel and country/HC labels.")
}

short_strata <- alloc_base %>% filter(n_seq < min_sequences_per_stratum)
if (nrow(short_strata) > 0L) {
  cat(
    "\nWarning: strata with fewer than", min_sequences_per_stratum,
    "isolates will be fully sampled (cannot apply floor of 20):\n"
  )
  print(short_strata %>% dplyr::select(HC_Bio_Combined, n_seq), n = 20)
}

base_floor <- pmin(min_sequences_per_stratum, alloc_base$n_seq)
if (sum(base_floor) > target_n_proportional) {
  stop(
    "Sum of per-stratum floors (", sum(base_floor),
    ") exceeds target_n_proportional (", target_n_proportional,
    "). Increase target_n_proportional or lower min_sequences_per_stratum."
  )
}

remaining <- target_n_proportional - sum(base_floor)
w <- as.numeric(alloc_base$n_cases)
exact_extra <- (w / sum(w)) * remaining
q_extra <- floor(exact_extra)
while (sum(q_extra) < remaining) {
  gap <- exact_extra - q_extra
  j <- which.max(gap)
  q_extra[j] <- q_extra[j] + 1L
}

q <- as.integer(base_floor + q_extra)
alloc_base$quota <- q
alloc_base$base_floor <- as.integer(base_floor)
alloc_base$quota_epidemic_extra <- as.integer(q_extra)

quota_tbl <- alloc_base %>%
  mutate(
    weight_cases = n_cases / sum(n_cases),
    quota_capped = pmin(quota, n_seq),
    shortfall = quota - quota_capped
  )

cat(
  "\n--- Epidemic-weighted allocation (target =", target_n_proportional,
  "; floor =", min_sequences_per_stratum, "per stratum when possible; remainder proportional to cases) ---\n"
)
print(
  quota_tbl %>%
    dplyr::select(
      HC_Bio_Combined, n_cases, weight_cases, n_seq,
      base_floor, quota_epidemic_extra, quota, quota_capped
    ),
  n = 20
)
if (any(quota_tbl$shortfall > 0, na.rm = TRUE)) {
  cat("Note: quota exceeded available isolates in some strata; capped (see quota_capped). Final row sum may be < target.\n")
}

sample_hc_bio_proportional <- function(df, quotas_df, seed) {
  set.seed(seed)
  quotas_df <- quotas_df %>%
    dplyr::select(HC_Bio_Combined, quota_capped) %>%
    dplyr::rename(quota = quota_capped)
  df %>%
    mutate(HC_Bio_Combined = trimws(as.character(HC_Bio_Combined))) %>%
    filter(!is.na(HC_Bio_Combined), nzchar(HC_Bio_Combined)) %>%
    semi_join(quotas_df, by = "HC_Bio_Combined") %>%
    group_by(HC_Bio_Combined) %>%
    group_modify(function(.x, .y) {
      qtake <- quotas_df$quota[quotas_df$HC_Bio_Combined == .y$HC_Bio_Combined[1]]
      if (length(qtake) == 0L || qtake == 0L || nrow(.x) == 0L) {
        return(.x[0, ])
      }
      k <- min(as.integer(qtake), nrow(.x))
      dplyr::slice_sample(.x, n = k, replace = FALSE)
    }) %>%
    ungroup()
}

if (!dir.exists("proportional")) dir.create("proportional")

rep_label <- "rep1_proportional"
out_dir   <- file.path("proportional", rep_label)
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

sub_p <- sample_hc_bio_proportional(data, quota_tbl, seed = 2324L)

cat("\n========== HC_Bio_Combined proportional sample:", rep_label, "==========\n")
print(count(sub_p, HC_Bio_Combined, name = "n_sampled"), n = 100)
cat("Total sequences:", nrow(sub_p), "\n")

write.table(
  quota_tbl,
  file.path(out_dir, "proportional_allocation.tsv"),
  sep = "\t", row.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE
)
out_tsv <- file.path(out_dir, paste0(rep_label, ".tsv"))
write.table(sub_p, out_tsv, sep = "\t", row.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)
message("Wrote ", out_tsv)
```

### Plotting of rep1 proportional subsample

```{r proportional-subsample-plots}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(lubridate)
library(scales)
library(patchwork)
library(readxl)

required_seq  <- "final_seq_data_updated.tsv"
required_case <- "Latest Reported Events.xlsx"

if (!file.exists(required_seq))  stop("Missing final_seq_data_updated.tsv in parent dir")
if (!file.exists(required_case)) stop("Missing Latest Reported Events.xlsx in parent dir")

base_dir <- getwd()

d       <- "rep1_proportional"
run_dir <- file.path(base_dir, "proportional", d)
run_tsv <- file.path(run_dir, paste0(d, ".tsv"))
if (!file.exists(run_tsv)) {
  stop("Missing proportional subsample file: ", run_tsv, " — run hc-bio-proportional-subsample first.")
}

message("Running proportional subsample plots in: ", d)

full_raw      <- read.delim(file.path(base_dir, required_seq), sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
subsample_raw <- read.delim(run_tsv, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
case_raw      <- read_excel(file.path(base_dir, required_case))

full_raw <- full_raw %>%
  mutate(Collection_Date_Final = as.Date(Collection_Date_Final),
         Year = lubridate::year(Collection_Date_Final))

subsample_raw <- subsample_raw %>%
  mutate(Collection_Date_Final = as.Date(Collection_Date_Final),
         Year = lubridate::year(Collection_Date_Final))

case_europe <- case_raw %>%
  mutate(Year = lubridate::year(as.Date(`observation date`))) %>%
  group_by(Year) %>%
  summarise(total_cases = dplyr::n_distinct(`Event ID`), .groups = "drop")

hab_pal <- c(
  Coastal = "#0072B2", Farm = "#CD5C5C", Forest = "#BCBD22", Grassland = "#26A69A",
  `Human_Modified` = "#56B4E9", Marine = "#CC79A7", Shrubland = "lightslategray",
  Urban = "#E6842A", Others = "#000000", Woodland = "#6B4C1B", Rock = "#7570B3", Wetland = "#006D2C"
)

clean_hab <- function(df) df %>%
  mutate(Habitat = trimws(Habitat),
         Habitat = ifelse(Habitat %in% names(hab_pal), Habitat, "Others"))

full_hab <- clean_hab(full_raw)
sub_hab  <- clean_hab(subsample_raw)

hab_counts_full <- full_hab %>%
  group_by(Year, Habitat) %>%
  summarise(n_isolates = n_distinct(Isolate_Id), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(case_europe, by = "Year")

hab_counts_sub <- sub_hab %>%
  group_by(Year, Habitat) %>%
  summarise(n_isolates = n_distinct(Isolate_Id), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(case_europe, by = "Year")

scale_hab_full <- max(hab_counts_full$n_isolates, na.rm = TRUE) / max(hab_counts_full$total_cases, na.rm = TRUE)
scale_hab_sub  <- max(hab_counts_sub$n_isolates,  na.rm = TRUE) / max(hab_counts_sub$total_cases,  na.rm = TRUE)

plot_hab <- function(df, sf, ttl) {
  ggplot(df, aes(x = Year)) +
    geom_bar(aes(y = n_isolates, fill = Habitat),
             stat = "identity", position = "dodge", width = 1.4) +
    geom_line(aes(y = total_cases * sf), colour = "black", size = 1) +
    geom_point(aes(y = total_cases * sf), colour = "black", size = 2) +
    geom_text(
      data = df %>% filter(Year == 2017) %>% slice(1),
      aes(x = Year, y = total_cases * sf, label = "Case Counts"),
      colour = "black", size = 7, hjust = -0.2, vjust = -0.8, inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = hab_pal, drop = FALSE) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2016:2025) +
    scale_y_continuous("Number of Isolates",
                       sec.axis = sec_axis(~./sf, name = "Number of Cases")) +
    labs(title = ttl, x = "Year") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.direction = "horizontal")
}

p_hab_full <- plot_hab(hab_counts_full, scale_hab_full, "Isolates & Cases by Habitat (Full Data)")
p_hab_sub  <- plot_hab(hab_counts_sub,  scale_hab_sub,
                       "Isolates & Cases by Habitat (Proportional subsample)")

combined_hab <- (p_hab_full / p_hab_sub) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

type_pal <- c(
  Domestic_Mammal = "#6A3D9A", Domestic_Bird = "#CD5C5C",
  Wild_Mammal = "#BCBD22", Human = "#1B9E77", Wild_Bird = "#3C5488", Others = "#000000"
)

clean_type <- function(df) df %>%
  mutate(Type = trimws(Type),
         Type = ifelse(Type %in% names(type_pal), Type, "Others"))

full_type <- clean_type(full_raw)
sub_type  <- clean_type(subsample_raw)

type_counts_full <- full_type %>%
  group_by(Year, Type) %>%
  summarise(n_isolates = n_distinct(Isolate_Id), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(case_europe, by = "Year")

type_counts_sub <- sub_type %>%
  group_by(Year, Type) %>%
  summarise(n_isolates = n_distinct(Isolate_Id), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(case_europe, by = "Year")

scale_type_full <- max(type_counts_full$n_isolates, na.rm = TRUE) / max(type_counts_full$total_cases, na.rm = TRUE)
scale_type_sub  <- max(type_counts_sub$n_isolates,  na.rm = TRUE) / max(type_counts_sub$total_cases,  na.rm = TRUE)

plot_type <- function(df, sf, ttl) {
  ggplot(df, aes(x = Year)) +
    geom_bar(aes(y = n_isolates, fill = Type),
             stat = "identity", position = "dodge", width = 1.4) +
    geom_line(aes(y = total_cases * sf), colour = "black", size = 1) +
    geom_point(aes(y = total_cases * sf), colour = "black", size = 2) +
    geom_text(
      data = df %>% filter(Year == 2017) %>% slice(1),
      aes(x = Year, y = total_cases * sf, label = "Case Counts"),
      colour = "black", size = 7, hjust = -0.2, vjust = -0.8, inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = type_pal, name = "Host", drop = FALSE) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2016:2025) +
    scale_y_continuous("Number of Isolates",
                       sec.axis = sec_axis(~./sf, name = "Number of Cases")) +
    labs(title = ttl, x = "Year") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.direction = "horizontal")
}

p_type_full <- plot_type(type_counts_full, scale_type_full, "Isolates & Cases by Host Type (Full Data)")
p_type_sub  <- plot_type(type_counts_sub,  scale_type_sub,
                         "Isolates & Cases by Host Type (Proportional)")

combined_type <- (p_type_full / p_type_sub) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

hc_cols <- c(
  HC_Cluster_1_Alpine = "#0072B2",
  HC_Cluster_1_Arctic = "#8DA0CB",
  HC_Cluster_1_Atlantic = "#CD5C5C",
  HC_Cluster_1_Continental = "#BCBD22",
  HC_Cluster_2_Alpine = "#26A69A",
  HC_Cluster_2_Continental = "#CC79A7",
  HC_Cluster_2_Mediterranean = "lightslategray",
  HC_Cluster_2_Pannonian = "#6B4C1B",
  HC_Cluster_3_Alpine = "#7570B3",
  HC_Cluster_3_Boreal = "#006D2C",
  HC_Cluster_4_Mediterranean = "#56B4E9"
)

clean_hc_bio <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(HC_Bio_Combined = trimws(as.character(HC_Bio_Combined))) %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(HC_Bio_Combined),
      nzchar(HC_Bio_Combined),
      HC_Bio_Combined %in% names(hc_cols)
    )
}

full_hc_bio <- clean_hc_bio(full_raw)
sub_hc_bio  <- clean_hc_bio(subsample_raw)
if (nrow(full_hc_bio) == 0) {
  stop("No rows left after matching HC_Bio_Combined to hc_cols (check labels match pipeline 7C, underscore form).")
}

hc_bio_counts_full <- full_hc_bio %>%
  group_by(Year, HC_Bio_Combined) %>%
  summarise(n_isolates = n_distinct(Isolate_Id), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(case_europe, by = "Year")

hc_bio_counts_sub <- sub_hc_bio %>%
  group_by(Year, HC_Bio_Combined) %>%
  summarise(n_isolates = n_distinct(Isolate_Id), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(case_europe, by = "Year")

scale_hc_bio_full <- max(hc_bio_counts_full$n_isolates, na.rm = TRUE) / max(hc_bio_counts_full$total_cases, na.rm = TRUE)
scale_hc_bio_sub  <- max(hc_bio_counts_sub$n_isolates,  na.rm = TRUE) / max(hc_bio_counts_sub$total_cases,  na.rm = TRUE)

plot_hc_bio <- function(df, sf, ttl) {
  ggplot(df, aes(x = Year)) +
    geom_bar(aes(y = n_isolates, fill = HC_Bio_Combined),
             stat = "identity", position = "dodge", width = 1.4) +
    geom_line(aes(y = total_cases * sf), colour = "black", size = 1) +
    geom_point(aes(y = total_cases * sf), colour = "black", size = 2) +
    geom_text(
      data = df %>% filter(Year == 2017) %>% slice(1),
      aes(x = Year, y = total_cases * sf, label = "Case Counts"),
      colour = "black", size = 7, hjust = -0.2, vjust = -0.8, inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = hc_cols,
      name   = "HC_Bio_Combined",
      drop   = FALSE,
      breaks = names(hc_cols)
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2016:2025) +
    scale_y_continuous("Number of Isolates",
                       sec.axis = sec_axis(~./sf, name = "Number of Cases")) +
    labs(title = ttl, x = "Year") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.direction = "horizontal") +
    guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 3))
}

p_hc_bio_full <- plot_hc_bio(hc_bio_counts_full, scale_hc_bio_full,
                             "Isolates & Cases by HC_Bio_Combined (Full Data)")
p_hc_bio_sub  <- plot_hc_bio(hc_bio_counts_sub,  scale_hc_bio_sub,
                             "Isolates & Cases by HC_Bio_Combined (Proportional)")

combined_hc_bio <- (p_hc_bio_full / p_hc_bio_sub) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave(file.path(run_dir, paste0("Habitat_", d, ".png")),
       combined_hab,  width = 14, height = 9, dpi = 300, bg = "transparent")
ggsave(file.path(run_dir, paste0("Habitat_", d, ".pdf")),
       combined_hab,  width = 14, height = 9)

ggsave(file.path(run_dir, paste0("Host_", d, ".png")),
       combined_type, width = 14, height = 9, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(run_dir, paste0("Host_", d, ".pdf")),
       combined_type, width = 14, height = 9)

ggsave(file.path(run_dir, paste0("HC_Bio_Combined_", d, ".png")),
       combined_hc_bio, width = 14, height = 9, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(run_dir, paste0("HC_Bio_Combined_", d, ".pdf")),
       combined_hc_bio, width = 14, height = 9)

message("Proportional subsample plots finished (see proportional/rep1_proportional).")
```

### Create FASTA file for all replicates

```{r create-fasta-rep1}
library(dplyr)

base_dir <- getwd()

required_fasta_cols <- c(
  "Isolate_Id", "Isolate_Name", "Habitat", "Type",
  "Country", "HC_Bio_Combined", "Collection_Date_Final", "Sequence"
)

rep1_tsv_files <- list(
  file.path(base_dir, "stratified",   "rep1_stratified",   "rep1_stratified.tsv"),
  file.path(base_dir, "equal",        "rep1_equal",        "rep1_equal.tsv"),
  file.path(base_dir, "proportional", "rep1_proportional", "rep1_proportional.tsv")
)

for (tsv_file in rep1_tsv_files) {
  if (!file.exists(tsv_file)) {
    warning("Missing TSV file: ", tsv_file)
    next
  }

  rep_label <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(tsv_file))
  subsampled_data <- read.delim(tsv_file, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

  missing_cols <- setdiff(required_fasta_cols, names(subsampled_data))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    warning(
      "Skipping ", tsv_file, " (missing columns: ",
      paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "), ")"
    )
    next
  }

  fasta_file <- file.path(dirname(tsv_file), paste0(rep_label, ".fasta"))
  fileConn <- file(fasta_file, "w")

  apply(subsampled_data, 1, function(row) {
    header <- paste0(
      ">", row[["Isolate_Id"]], "|",
      row[["Isolate_Name"]], "|",
      row[["Habitat"]], "|",
      row[["Type"]], "|",
      row[["Country"]], "|",
      row[["HC_Bio_Combined"]], "|",
      row[["Collection_Date_Final"]]
    )
    writeLines(header, fileConn)
    writeLines(row[["Sequence"]], fileConn)
  })

  close(fileConn)
  cat("FASTA file saved as", fasta_file, "\n")
}
```
